[1/30 Update Celebration Gift]

Sensei, check out the new content to be updated on 1/30 (Tue)!
And don't forget to grab your Pyroxene x1,200 gift on the way!

🗓️Period: 1/30 (Tue) After Maintenance – 2/6 (Tue) 2:59 PM (UTC)
